overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through rainy downtown Los Santos. The player navigates wet sidewalks and crosses busy intersections surrounded by modern glass skyscrapers while heavy rain creates reflective puddles on the streets and traffic flows through the city.

events.description: Los Santos Transit city bus passes through intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to outdoor restaurant seating

notable_agents.action: city bus driving through the intersection perpendicular to the camera's path

entered.detail: large brown patio umbrellas and black metal fencing for sidewalk dining area
tall curved building with horizontal blue window stripes reflecting the grey sky
tall yellow tower crane attached to building under construction
mature tree with green canopy growing from sidewalk cutout
white cylindrical planter with shrubbery near restaurant entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk in an urban downtown area. Outdoor restaurant seating with large umbrellas lines the left side while a modern glass office tower rises on the right. Heavy rain creates reflective puddles on the concrete surface. A city bus passes through the intersection ahead, momentarily blocking the view of the cross street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner intersection with traffic signals

events.description: pedestrian in blue shirt and cap walks past the camera from left to right
motorcycle drives through the intersection followed by black SUV

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner waiting for traffic to clear, observing vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt walking past the camera along the sidewalk
black SUV waiting at the red traffic light at the intersection corner

entered.detail: metal pole with horizontal traffic signal arm showing red light

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a street corner intersection, transitioning from the sheltered sidewalk to the open crosswalk area. The yellow construction crane is now prominently visible against the grey sky. Various vehicles including a motorcycle and SUVs pass through the intersection. A pedestrian walks past the camera, and the traffic light remains red as the rain continues to fall steadily.

events.description: ego steps off the curb and begins crossing the wide intersection
camera tilts upward to view the tall skyscrapers surrounding the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide wet intersection, navigating between lanes of traffic while looking up at the surrounding towers

notable_agents.action: silver sports car driving through the intersection
black luxury sedan waiting at the intersection before proceeding

entered.detail: painted white zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
very tall modern skyscraper with white facade and horizontal balconies rising above other buildings
large office building with grid-patterned glass windows reflecting the rainy sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the wide intersection, crossing the rain-slicked asphalt marked with white crosswalk stripes. Looking up reveals a canyon of modern skyscrapers including a distinctive tall white tower with balconies. Vehicles including a silver sports car navigate the intersection as the rain creates mirror-like reflections on the street surface. The construction crane remains visible to the left against the grey hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with billboard signage

events.description: approaching building with large circular signage and rooftop billboard
reaching the opposite sidewalk and continuing along the street

agents.ego_description: completing the street crossing and walking along the opposite sidewalk past commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: person in leopard print jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
silver sports car parked or moving slowly near the corner building

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with distinctive circular logo signage and warm interior lighting
large advertising billboard mounted on roof of corner building showing illuminated advertisement
multi-story brick and glass commercial structure with ground floor shops

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera reaching the opposite side of the intersection and approaching a commercial corner building featuring a prominent circular sign and rooftop billboard. A pedestrian in a leopard print jacket walks ahead on the sidewalk. The silver sports car from the intersection is now visible near the corner building. The construction crane and previous glass tower fade into the background as the camera moves into a new street environment with different architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a rain-drenched urban intersection, moving from a sheltered sidewalk into the open expanse of a skyscraper-lined canyon. It begins by walking past outdoor restaurant umbrellas and a glass office tower, where heavy rain creates reflective puddles on the concrete as a city bus passes through the intersection ahead. As the camera reaches the street corner, the view opens to reveal a yellow construction crane against a grey sky while motorcycles and SUVs navigate the steady downpour. The scene then shifts into the wide intersection, crossing rain-slicked asphalt and looking up toward a distinctive white tower with balconies as a silver sports car glides through mirror-like reflections. Finally, the camera reaches the opposite sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a leopard print jacket and approaching a commercial building with a circular sign as the previous towers fade into the background.
